name: ContinuousMonitoring
description: Continuously detect state, evidence, and compatibility changes.

name: PolicyEnforcement
description: Enforce approved controls before and after configuration changes.

name: VersionValidation
description: Validate installed and target versions against constraints before approval.

name: ChangeControl
description: Require reviewed, traceable, and reversible configuration changes.

name: PreDeploymentValidation
description: Evaluate compatibility, readiness, conflicts, and risk before deployment.

name: ScheduledComplianceAudit
description: Periodically reassess fleet state against current policies and rules.

name: DependencyVerification
description: Resolve and verify all direct and transitive prerequisites.

name: LifecycleManagement
description: Track approval, servicing, deprecation, and replacement windows.

name: PatchGovernance
description: Prioritize, test, stage, and verify corrective updates.

name: ConfigurationBaseline
description: Define and continuously compare against approved desired state.
